name: codex-claude-bridge
description: Wraps OpenAI Codex inside Claude Code as an adversarial reviewer and execution rescue tool. Five slash commands with a hard-coded 7-attack-surface taxonomy and structured-JSON output.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test

author: TBD

comments.deps: HTTP via undici (smaller, faster than axios for this workload). CLI parsing via commander (clearer ergonomics than yargs for a small surface). Token encryption: keytar primary (uses the OS keychain — Keychain on macOS, Credential Manager on Windows, Secret Service on Linux); sodium-native fallback when keychain unavailable. JSON Schema validation via Ajv + ajv-formats.
